response.overview: *Important Edit:* The footage from 2:47-3:10 belongs to Tony Arena (aka “Anonymous Boy”). It was taken at the Vaginal Davis & PME show at Tramps in NYC on The White To Be Angry tour. The credit for this footage was mistakenly left out of the end of the video. Thank you to Tony for bringing my attention to this oversight!  —  Vaginal Creme Davis is a living legend in the queercore, punk, and art worlds. Let's explore her life and legacy today.  Be sure to like and subscribe to support a small LGBTQ creator!  Check out my playlists for more on LGBTQ history and culture, as well as lots on art history!
response.title: Vaginal Davis: Queer Godmother
